calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Appearances: Respondent, Michele Gaabriel Lee present in pro per.
Christopher Cole, Esq. for and with the Appellant Steve Cole.
All parties stipulated to the hearing by a judge pro-tem., and are sworn.
Appellant and Respondent testifies on their own behalf, and responds to the questions from the Court with documentary evidence introduced
At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission.
No additional evidence is retained by the Court.
JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported. (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Continued To Dec-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Judgment Entered
